data.title: Georgia Introduces New Bitcoin Reserve Bill
data.description:
A competing SBR bill has been filed in Georgia
source: https://u.today/georgia-introduces-new-bitcoin-reserve-bill

data.title: Bybit CEO says exchange has closed shortfall in ETH reserves, plans to release audited POR report
data.description:
Bybit plans to release an audited proof of reserves report to verify that it has restored its client assets on a one-to-one basis.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342896/bybit-ceo-says-exchange-has-closed-shortfall-in-eth-reserves-plans-to-release-audited-por-report?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Infini Faces Security Breach Due To Retained Admin Access
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cyvers Alerts has reported that Infini experienced a security breach due to a hacker secretly retaining administrative access. The hacker operated from the address 0xc49b5e5b9da66b9126c1a62e9761e6b2147de3e1, which was initially involved in developing the contract as part of the Infini project. However, after the project's completion, the hacker covertly maintained administrator privileges.

data.title: Berachain TVL surpasses Base and ranks sixth
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to DeFiLlama data, Berachain TVL reached 3.271 billion US dollars, surpassing Base's TVL (3.27 billion US dollars) and ranking sixth among all chains.

data.title: Bybit stolen funds likely headed to crypto mixers next: Elliptic
data.description:
Based on past behavior, the Lazarus Group could start using mixers to obfuscate the stolen funds, but it may prove more challenging this time due to the sheer volume of stolen assets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bybit-stolen-funds-likely-headed-crypto-mixers-next-elliptic?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Ft%3D1740376364853&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Su Zhu-backed Ox.Fun dismisses insolvency claims amid JefeDAO feud
data.description:
OX.FUN has been in a dispute with JefeDAO over a frozen $1 million deposit, with JefeDAO accusing the exchange of extortion.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342889/su-zhu-backed-ox-fun-dismisses-insolvency-claims-amid-jefedao-feud?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has liquidated nearly 120 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 4 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $119 million, of which long orders have been liquidated for $111 million and short orders have been liquidated for $7.9664 million.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC on Solana
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury has minted an additional 250 million USDC on the Solana blockchain.

data.title: USDC Treasury mints 250 million new USDC on Solana
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, 4 minutes ago, USDC Treasury minted 250 million new USDC on Solana.
